assistant.name: Penny
assistant.greeting: Hi Morgan, I can audit your environment and draft your next campaign setup.

script.text: Audit our current environment and explain what headless unlocks for our team.
I found disconnected journeys, duplicate segment logic, and channel silos. A headless model lets us orchestrate audiences and experiences from one composable layer.

script.title: Environment Audit Complete
script.text: 17 audience definitions consolidated, 6 overlapping journeys flagged.
